name: 4 Images 1 Word
author: Poki
description: 4-Images-1-Word is a game in which 4 images are connected by 1 word. It is up to you to guess which word we are looking for. Play this game with your friends and challenge them to see who's best at it. How to play: Use your mouse and follow the instructions on the screen. About the creator: The game was created by Codethislab. They have made many more titles on Poki.
